title: Bankers may love using Claude but the bills are beginning to reflect the AI industry’s financial reality
description: Some banks are already feeling the pinch as artificial intelligence firms raise charges. Financial services firms could find themselves trapped by AI tools that get increasingly expensive as companies align pricing with costs and profit pursuits.

title: Plots, love letters and remedies: The medieval secrets being revealed by AI
description: A 400-year-old coded text found at the Vatican Library is among the historic documents and messages that are being cracked with the help of artificial intelligence.
content: Deep in the archives of the Vatican library, a mysterious hand-written book, scrawled with strange symbols, had lain unread for more than 400 years. Its cryptic pages apparently concealed secret remedies "for affections of the human body", according ... [8593 chars]

title: Fight the SpaceX FOMO. You'll Be Glad You Did
description: Space Exploration Technologies Corp. is a special company that most investors will want in their portfolios… eventually. It dominates the launch business, has an unrivaled collection of satellites in orbit to provide broadband and offers exposure to artificial intelligence (making it a great hedge against the risk that AI will get you fired). That constellation of facts is pretty remarkable — and it’s not really up for debate, whether you trust serial exaggerator Elon Musk or not.

title: Canadians should be cautious, doctor warns
description: Nearly half of Canadians say they have used artificial intelligence chatbots for medical advice over the past year, but most still want human doctors to remain responsible for diagnosis, prescriptions and care decisions, according to a new survey.

title: Humanoids Summit gives Tokyo a peek of a robotic future

content:
